hero.subHeading: Launch products with polished design, reliable engineering, and real momentum — not just beautiful visuals.

services.subHeading: We offer comprehensive web solutions tailored to elevate your online presence and drive results.

services.title: Portfolio Site (Pre-defined)
services.description: Launch a polished portfolio site fast with CMS included and 3 months support.

faqs.question: Can the layout be customized?
faqs.answer: We tailor colors, typography, content, and imagery while keeping the proven page structure.

services.title: Portfolio Site (Custom Design)
services.description: Custom visual design for your portfolio with CMS and business-ready polish.

faqs.question: Will I be able to update the site?
faqs.answer: Yes. The handoff includes an editable CMS and guidance for routine content updates.

services.title: Landing Page
services.description: High-converting landing pages built for fast launches and lead capture.

faqs.question: Can you connect our CRM?
faqs.answer: Yes. We can connect supported form, email, analytics, and CRM tools during implementation.

services.title: Business Website
services.description: Full business website development with responsive design and CMS support.

faqs.question: Do you help with content structure?
faqs.answer: Yes. We organize the site around visitor questions, business goals, and clear conversion paths.

services.title: Custom Mobile App
services.description: Mobile app development for native-like experiences and high-engagement products.

faqs.question: Can we begin with an MVP?
faqs.answer: Yes. We can prioritize the smallest coherent release and define later phases before development begins.

services.title: CRM + Analytics Integration
services.description: Connect your website with CRM and analytics systems for smarter customer workflows.

faqs.question: Can you work with our existing website?
faqs.answer: Yes. We first review the current stack and recommend integrations that fit its capabilities.

pricing.subHeading: Real agency estimates for digital products, not one-size-fits-all packages.

plans.description: Fast launch portfolio sites with CMS included and 3 months of support.

plans.name: Custom Portfolio
plans.description: Custom portfolio and landing page design with polished branding and CMS.

plans.name: Business Website
plans.description: Full business website build tailored for growth, brands, and conversions.

specialSection.question: Ready to define your next product?
specialSection.answer: Start with a discovery call so we can scope your project, timeline, and outcomes clearly.

testimonials.subHeading: Don't just take our word for it. Hear directly from our satisfied clients.

testimonials.name: Arjun Mehra
testimonials.content: We hired the team to give our marketing agency a stronger digital presence, and the results were immediate. They rebuilt our site, aligned messaging with our paid campaigns, and redesigned lead capture so we could qualify prospects before the first call. Within six weeks, our inbound leads were higher quality and our cost per lead dropped significantly.

testimonials.name: Neha Sharma
testimonials.content: As a real estate business, we needed an online experience that matched the premium listings we represent. They created a polished showcase for our properties, improved our local SEO, and added a booking flow that made it easy for clients to request viewings. Within two months, we started getting more qualified buyer inquiries and the site felt like a real sales asset.

testimonials.name: Priya Singh
testimonials.content: I run a neighbourhood gift shop and needed help moving beyond walk-in traffic. They built a clean online storefront, set up a simple order form, and helped me promote seasonal products on social media. The new site made my shop look trustworthy, and customers started calling instead of just walking past the window.

portfolio.subHeading: Explore case studies from digital products, platforms, and founder-led launches built for growth.

projects.title: Bugsy
projects.description: A scalable video platform with polished discovery and premium playback experiences.
projects.overview: Bugsy brings video discovery and playback into one cohesive, responsive product experience.
projects.challenge: The platform needed to make a growing media catalogue feel approachable without compromising the viewing experience.
projects.approach: We organized discovery around clear content hierarchy, reusable interface patterns, and a playback flow that stays focused on the media.
outcomes: A consistent experience across browsing and playback
A scalable interface foundation for future catalogue growth

projects.title: Pulse Commerce
projects.description: A conversion-focused storefront built for faster checkout and higher average order value.
projects.overview: Pulse Commerce is a streamlined storefront designed to help shoppers move from discovery to checkout with less friction.
projects.challenge: The shopping journey needed clearer product emphasis and a more direct path through cart and checkout decisions.
projects.approach: We simplified navigation, strengthened product hierarchy, and designed consistent purchase actions across screen sizes.
outcomes: A reusable storefront system ready for catalogue expansion

projects.title: Nexa CRM
projects.description: A sales dashboard that surfaces action-ready insights and simplifies team workflows.
projects.overview: Nexa CRM turns sales activity into a focused daily workspace.
projects.challenge: Teams needed to find urgent opportunities without navigating dense reports.
projects.approach: We prioritized action-ready signals and progressive detail across the dashboard.

projects.title: FieldGuide
projects.description: A storyteller-led marketing site with custom motion and polished conversion points.
projects.overview: FieldGuide is a narrative marketing site that balances brand story with clear next steps.
projects.challenge: The brand needed an expressive web presence without losing conversion clarity.
projects.approach: We paired editorial layouts and restrained motion with repeated, contextual calls to action.
outcomes: Clear conversion points throughout the experience

projects.title: ScaleHub
projects.description: A data-rich dashboard built for fast decision-making and easier product management.
projects.overview: ScaleHub brings operational metrics and product work into a single management view.
projects.challenge: Dense information had to remain useful without overwhelming teams.
projects.approach: We grouped metrics by decision context and created repeatable patterns for filters, trends, and status.
outcomes: A consistent foundation for new dashboard modules

projects.title: LaunchPad
projects.description: A launch landing page designed to turn early traction into inbound interest.
projects.overview: LaunchPad gives an early-stage product a concise, credible launch presence.
projects.challenge: The product needed to explain its value quickly while collecting meaningful early interest.
projects.approach: We shaped the page around one promise, supporting proof, and a focused lead path.
outcomes: A direct path for prospective users to express interest

para.para1: Founded with a passion for digital excellence, Wired Creations is your partner in transforming ideas into stunning web experiences. We blend creativity with technical expertise to deliver solutions that not only look beautiful but perform exceptionally.
para.para2: Our team of designers and developers are committed to understanding your business goals and creating digital solutions that drive real results. Whether you're a startup or an established brand, we're here to help you succeed online.

textSections.label: Our Mission
textSections.text: To empower businesses through innovative web design and development, creating digital products that inspire and convert.

textSections.label: Our Vision
textSections.text: To be the most trusted web development partner for businesses looking to establish a strong digital presence and achieve their goals.

heading.headingP2: Building a Scalable Video Platform Inspired by YouTube

para.para1: A fast-growing content creator wanted a platform where users could upload videos, manage watch history, authenticate securely, and enjoy a smooth viewing experience—without relying solely on big platforms.
para.para2: They approached us to build a custom video streaming application, designed for flexibility, data ownership, and long-term scalability.

textSections.label: Our Mission
textSections.text: Create a full, end-to-end video platform with modern engineering practices and real-world reliability.
